response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrated Java proficiency in professional contexts, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds a senior-level title with no indication of willingness or readiness to operate as an entry-level contributor in an insurance-sector agile team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not sufficient for client collaboration
No clear evidence of Java usage in professional projects despite listing it as a skill
Overqualified and senior-level background contradicts entry-level role expectations
